<!-- GENERATED by CMakeLists.txt tcc_generate_node_doc(); do not edit. -->
# tcc configurable nodes

The user-settable build knobs, grouped, with their relevance gate.
Generated from the config node registry (CMakeLists.txt section 1z).
See [feature-matrix.md](feature-matrix.md) for the full preprocessor catalog.

| Node | Group | Type | Default | Choices | Shown when | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| `TCC_TOOLCHAIN_PROFILE` | Build targets | STRING | `auto` | auto, gcc, clang, tcc, msvc | always | Toolchain(s) to build with, in order (list, e.g. gcc;clang;tcc); single = profile+defaults |
| `TCC_ENABLE_CROSS` | Build targets | BOOL | `OFF` |  | always | Build all cross compilers (Makefile: make cross) |
| `TCC_BUILD_STATIC` | Build targets | BOOL | `ON` |  | always | Build libtcc.a (ON) instead of shared libtcc (OFF) |
| `TCC_DISABLE_RPATH` | Build targets | BOOL | `OFF` |  | NOT TCC_BUILD_STATIC | Do not bake -rpath into binaries linking libtcc.so |
| `TCC_ONE_SOURCE` | Build targets | BOOL | `OFF` |  | always | Build libtcc from a single TU (Makefile: ONE_SOURCE) |
| `TCC_BUILD_TESTS` | Build targets | BOOL | `ON` |  | always | Build/enable the test suite (tests/Makefile) |
| `TCC_BUILD_DOC` | Build targets | BOOL | `OFF` |  | always | Build documentation (man/html/info) |
| `TCC_CONFIG_MINGW32` | tcc features | BOOL | `OFF` |  | always | Build a WIN32/mingw32 target (input: forces TCC_TARGETOS=WIN32) |
| `TCC_CONFIG_BACKTRACE` | tcc features | BOOL | `ON` |  | always | Enable stack backtraces (-bt / -run) |
| `TCC_CONFIG_BCHECK` | tcc features | BOOL | `ON` |  | TCC_CONFIG_BACKTRACE | Enable bounds checker (-b) |
| `TCC_CONFIG_PREDEFS` | tcc features | BOOL | `ON` |  | always | Compile tccdefs.h into the binary (c2str) |
| `TCC_CONFIG_PIE` | tcc features | BOOL | `OFF` |  | NOT TCC_TARGETOS STREQUAL "WIN32" AND NOT TCC_TARGETOS STREQUAL "Darwin" | Let tcc generate position independent executables |
| `TCC_CONFIG_PIC` | tcc features | BOOL | `OFF` |  | NOT TCC_TARGETOS STREQUAL "WIN32" AND NOT TCC_TARGETOS STREQUAL "Darwin" | Position independent code |
| `TCC_WITH_SELINUX` | tcc features | BOOL | `OFF` |  | always | Use mmap for executable memory (tcc -run) |
| `TCC_CONFIG_NEW_DTAGS` | tcc features | BOOL | `OFF` |  | NOT TCC_TARGETOS STREQUAL "WIN32" AND NOT TCC_TARGETOS STREQUAL "Darwin" | Use DT_RUNPATH instead of DT_RPATH (tcc-emitted; always relevant on ELF) |
| `TCC_AUTO_TCCDIR` | tcc features | BOOL | `ON` |  | always | Build-tree tcc auto-discovers libtcc1.a + headers locally, falling back to system CONFIG_TCCDIR |
| `TCC_CONFIG_LIBC` | tcc features | STRING | `''` | '', uClibc, musl | NOT TCC_TARGETOS STREQUAL "WIN32" AND NOT TCC_TARGETOS STREQUAL "Darwin" | Target libc: '', uClibc, or musl |
| `TCC_CONFIG_DWARF` | tcc features | STRING | `''` | '', 0, 2, 3, 4, 5 | always | DWARF debug version (2..5); empty = stabs |
| `TCC_CONFIG_SEMLOCK` | tcc features | STRING | `''` |  | always | CONFIG_TCC_SEMLOCK value (free-form numeric; empty = tcc.h default 1) |
| `TCC_CONFIG_NEW_MACHO` | Darwin | STRING | `''` | '', yes, no, auto | TCC_TARGETOS STREQUAL "Darwin" | Force apple object format: yes|no|auto |
| `TCC_CONFIG_CODESIGN` | Darwin | STRING | `''` | '', yes, no, auto | TCC_TARGETOS STREQUAL "Darwin" | Use codesign on apple to sign executables: yes|no|auto |
